elements.original_description: A smiling cartoon piggy bank with coins spilling out, surrounded by a green shield icon and a golden lock. The piggy bank sits on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a smiling cartoon piggy bank with coins spilling out, surrounded by a green shield icon and a golden lock. Clean flat vector art on a pure white background, high contrast, no shading or gradients. The image conveys a sense of security and success through its composition. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
